entry.title: 104. Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
entry.content:
problem

求二元樹的最大深度

solution

dfs

  • 用遞迴方式，求二元樹的深度，終止條件為當節點不存在時return 0，否則1+max(maxDepth(root->left), maxDepth(root->right))

bfs

  • 用bfs，用queue輔助，儲存拜訪當下節點的左右子節點，並將深度加一

    analysis

  • dfs
    time complexity O(n)
    space complexity O(logN)

  • bfs
    time complexity O(n)
    space complexity O(n) , N/2 樹最底層的節點數量

1143. Longest Common Subsequence

tags: leetcode dp

problem

給定兩字串，找出最長共同子序列(common subsequence)的長度

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(n*m)
  • space complexity O(n*m)

entry.title: 121. Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
entry.content:
problem

從股票價位陣列中找出，可以最大化淨利

Solution

dp

  • 維護一個dp 紀錄歷史至今最低價位，在用當天股價減去至今最低點，並更新ret

algo

analysis

  • dp
    • time complexity O(n)
    • speed complexity O(n)
  • algo
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 11. Container With Most Water
entry.content:
problem

從陣列中，找出最大積水量

solution

  • 兩個指標分別從左往右，從右往左，尋找最大積水量

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 125. Valid Palindrome
entry.content:
tags: leetcode Two Pointers

problem

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

137. Single Number II

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

從一維陣列找出那個不重複的數字，假設其他數字皆會出現三次

solution

  • 利用2進位表示法，逐一去將第i位元相加，並除以3

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

136. Single Number

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

  • 給定一維整數陣列，找出那個single number，假設其他數字皆會出現兩次

solution

option 1 - hash table

set/map find operation better than count operation, find 找到就return ，count則會繼續拜訪。

option 2 - Bit Manipulation

  • 善用 x^x=0特性 以及 XOR交換率

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

141. Linked List Cycle

tags: leetcode Linked List Two Pointers

problem

solution

two pointer ，slow fast pointers 用於linked list檢查是否包含環

option 1

option 2 - Two pointers

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

143. Reorder List

tags: leetcode Linked List Two pointers

problem

solution

option 1 - reverse Linked Lists

  1. two pointer to find the middle node
  2. reverse the second list
  3. merge two lists

option 2 - stack

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)

152. Maximum Product Subarray

tags: leetcode dp

problem

給定一陣列，求出乘積最大連續子陣列，並返回其值

Solution

option 1 dp

  • 維護兩dp，一條紀錄至今最小，一條紀錄至今最大，因為最大值可能是最小值乘以負數。

option 2 - reduce version

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

153. Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array

tags: leetcode Binary Search

problem

solution

option 1 - brute force

option 2 - Binary Search

s

analysis

entry.title: 15. 3Sum
entry.content:
problem

從陣列中，找出所有三個元素總和為零。

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(n^2)
  • space complexity O(1)

190. Reverse Bits

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

利用 >>i 取得第i位元

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

198. House Robber

tags: leetcode dp

problem

solution

維護一個dp，max(dp[i-1], dp[i-2]+nums[i])

  • reduce dp

    analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(n) -> O(1)

191. Number of 1 Bits

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

利用 n&(n-1) 找 n 在二進位表示中有多少個1

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 19. Remove Nth Node From End of List
entry.content:
problem

solution

利用快慢指標

  • recursive

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

206. Reverse Linked List

tags: leetcode Linked List

problem

reverse linked list

solution

option 1 - iterative

需要三個個指標

  • another version
  • other version

    option 2 - recursive

    analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • solution complexity O(n)

entry.title: 1. Two Sum
entry.content:
problem

一維陣列中找出兩數相加等於target，並返回其索引

Solution

brute force

sorting

  • 先排序，在用雙指標從排序後的陣列找出兩個元素其總和為target，再回原本陣列找出其索引。

hash table

  • 利用hash table 紀錄出現過元素及其索引

analysis

  • brute force
    • time complexity O(n^2)
    • space complexity O(1)
  • sorting
    • time complexity O(nlogn)
    • space complexity O(n)
  • hash table
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 20. Valid Parentheses
entry.content:
problem

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(n)

2119. A Number After a Double Reversal

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

analyze

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

213. House Robber II

tags: leetcode dp

problem

solution

一個只搶[1,n-1]，另一個只搶[0,n-2]，再取最大值

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

216. Combination Sum III

tags: leetcode backtracking

problem

給定k、n 找出所有和為n，長度為k的有效組合，其元素只能落在1到9區間，且數字必須唯一，不能重複取。

sloution

analysis

  • time complexity O(len(nums)^M), M if theight of our recursive
  • space complexity L , L is the longest combination

217. Contains Duplicate

tags: leetcode hash table

problem

找出陣列中是否一重複的數字

Solution

sorting

可以先sort 是否有前後兩元素相同

hash table

set or map

analysis

  • sorting
    • time complexity O(nlogn)
    • space complexity O(1)
  • hash table
    • time complexity O(n) assuming set find operation cost const time
    • space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 21. Merge Two Sorted Lists
entry.content:
problem

solution

  • new 兩個指標分別指向list1 list2 比較大小，小的放進 return list

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

231. Power of Two

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

238. Product of Array Except Self

tags: leetcode dp

problem

返回陣列，其元素為其餘元素相乘

Solution

維護兩個dp，一個從左往右累乘，另一個由右往左累乘

option 1

option 2

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • speed complexity O(n)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • speed complexity O(1)

242. Valid Anagram

tags: leetcode hash table

problem

solution

option 1 - sorting

option 2 - hash table

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(nlogn)
    • space complexity O(1)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 23. Merge k Sorted Lists
entry.content:
problem

solution

option 1 - merge lists

兩兩linked list 合併

option 2 - priority queue

建立一個 priority_queue 來儲存每個linked list的頭。
在遍歷pq，每次從priority_queue取出最小的linked list 頭，從priority_queue pop，再儲存linked list head->next。直到priority_queue 為空

priority_queue 排序可理解成return a->val > b->val;從大排到小，但從尾部開始pop，所以每次取出的是最小的

heap pop O(logn)
heap push O(logn)

analysis

  • option 1 merge
    • time complexity O(n^2)
    • space complexity O(n)
  • option 2 heap
    • time complexity O(nlogn)
    • space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 24. Swap Nodes in Pairs
entry.content:
problem

solution

  • cheat
    modify value of the next node
    option 1 - merge policy
    可以看作一條奇數索引的list與偶數索引的list 從頭merge two list
option 2 - *swap

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

268. Missing Number

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

給定一維陣列，那一個數字遺失

solution

math

三角形公式

  • total變數，可能會有overflow 問題

Bit

  • 善用 x^x=0 以及 XOR交換率
  • 因題目限制，陣列元素只會是正整數，利用陣列索引與元素做XOR

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

300. Longest Increasing Subsequence

tags: leetcode dp

problem

給定一個整數陣列，找出最遞增子序列。

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(n^2)
  • space complexity O(1)

287. Find the Duplicate Number

tags: leetcode Two pointers

problem

給定一維陣列，找出重複一遍的數字，其餘數字皆為不重複。不能修改原陣列。

solution

  • 利用兩個索引，一個跑的慢，一個跑得快，並找出相交位置。找到後一個從原點開始再跑，另一個從相遇地點開始跑。在遇到則為答案

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

322. Coin Change

tags: leetcode dp

problem

給定一組整數陣列coins，表示不同面額的硬幣，一個整數amount，請問最少硬幣數，可以組成amount元，如果不行return -1

solution

至少四種作法

  1. brute force, backtracking
  2. backtracking + memo pattern
  3. dp
  4. reduce dp
  • base case 面額0元，不需硬幣數，所以為0。
  • 遍歷coins，不斷尋找是否可以更新更小硬幣數

option 1

option 2 reduce dp

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n^amount)
    • space complexity O(n^2)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n*amount)
    • space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 33. Search in Rotated Sorted Array
entry.content:
problem

solution

option 1 Brute force

option 2 Binary Search

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • speed complexity O(1)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(logn)
    • speed complexity O(1)

326. Power of Three

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

338. Counting Bits

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation dp

problem

solution

option 1

option 2

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(nlogn)
    • space complexity O(1)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

342. Power of Four

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

347. Top K Frequent Elements

tags: leetcode priority queue

problem

solution

option 1 - heap

  • 先用一個hash table 紀錄每個數字與其出次數
  • 用一個heap，並自定義比較的函數，將{數字,出現次數 } push into heap
  • heap pop

analysis

  • time complexity O(nlogn)
  • space complexity O()

371. Sum of Two Integers

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

refer to

  • & 通常用於二進位的取位操作，例如一個數(x) x & 1 的結果就是取二進位的最末位，可以用來判斷奇偶。另外，相同位的兩個數字都為 1，則為 1，若有一個不為 1，則為0
  • ^ 異或運算，如果某位不同則為1，否則為0。另外，還有a^b = b^a，a^0=a
  • 加法可以用&、^ 實現

    solution

option 1 - iterative

  • 加入 0x7fffffff 以防overflow

    option 2 - recursive

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

389. Find the Difference

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

給定兩字串，字串t比字串s多出一個字元，將他找出來

solution

  • 逐一字串 t 拜訪，拜訪到的字元將轉其對應ASCII 取值，並累加
  • 逐一字串 s 拜訪，拜訪到的字元將轉其對應ASCII 取值，並相減
  • 遍歷字串s,t，對所有字元做xor

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 39. Combination Sum
entry.content:
problem

找出所有組合總和為target 的子序列，可以重複選取，但每組組合必須唯一。

sloution

  • 用遞迴暴力，遍歷每種可能，終止條件target<0 or

  • 因為可以重複，所以每次調用bracktracking(candidates, target - candidates[i], path, ret, i) 而不是l+1。

  • version 1

  • version 2 sorting

    analysis

  • time complexity O(len(nums)^M), M if theight of our recursive

  • space complexity L , L is the longest combination

entry.title: 40. Combination Sum II
entry.content:
problem

找出所有組合總和為target 的子序列，每個元素只能取一次，每組組合必須唯一。

sloution

if(i>l && candidates[i-1]==candidates[i]) continue; skip depulicate

analysis

  • time complexity O(len(nums)^M), M if theight of our recursive
  • space complexity L , L is the longest combination

entry.title: 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
entry.content:
problem

solution

  • vector version

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 48. Rotate Image
entry.content:
problem

solution

先對陣列以行為單位做reverse，再逐一對角線對調

analysis

  • time complexity O(n^2)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 53. Maximum Subarray
entry.content:
problem

給定一陣列，求出總和最大連續子陣列，並返回其值

Solution

option 1 - Divide and Conquer

option 2 - dp

option 3 - Kadane’s Algorithm

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(nlogn)
    • space complexity O(1)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • speed complexity O(n)
  • option 3
    • time complexity O(n)
    • speed complexity O(1)

entry.title: 55. Jump Game
entry.content:
problem

solution

dp 維護的是剩餘跳力，剩餘跳力是前一個位置的剩餘跳力 -1dp[i-1]-1的，或是前一個位置的最大跳力-1 nums[i-1]-1 取最大。如果當前剩餘跳力等於零，代表停在於此，小於零代表跳不到這裏。

option 1

option 2 reduce dp

  • greedy

    analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 49. Group Anagrams
entry.content:
problem

solution

option 1

用hash table 存下已出現的字串(排序過)及index

option 2

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n*mlogm) , m is the maximum of string
    • space complexity O(n)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 54. Spiral Matrix
entry.content:
problem

solution

維護一組陣列，控制下一步要走的方向

analysis

  • time complexity O(*m)
  • space complexity O(n*m)

560. Subarray sum equals k

tags: leetcode hash table

problem

找出連續子陣列，其總和為k 的數量

solution

  • hash table 統計連續子陣列總和及相應數量

    analyze

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(n)

567. Permutation in String

tags: leetcode Sliding Window

problem

solution

  • 需要兩個hash table紀錄(因順序不重要)，一個紀錄需要match的字串，另一個hash table搭配雙指標(l, r)，並將l與r之間的字元放進，當兩個hash table一樣是，則代表如果 s1 的排列之一是 s2 的子字串

analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 5. Longest Palindromic Substring
entry.content:
problem

solution

option 1 - two pointers

  • 利用雙索引從拜訪到的字元向所向右擴散

    option 2 - *dp

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 62. Unique Paths
entry.content:
problem

solution

option 1 - dp

option 2 - reduce dp

option 3 use math

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n*m)
    • space complexity O(n*m)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n*m)
    • space complexity O(n)

645. Set Mismatch

tags: leetcode Bit Manipulation

problem

solution

  • 遍歷陣列，並將元素在陣列中的正確位置(idx)
    • 未拜訪的元素，取倒數
    • 拜訪過的元素，則為重複出現的數字
  • 再次遍歷陣列，找出正數，即為遺失的數字

    analyze

  • time complexity O(n)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 70. Climbing Stairs
entry.content:
problem

solution

option 1

  • recursive version => time out
  • optimal recursive version

使用 hash table 紀錄已經call 過的function()，避免重複運算

option 2 - reduce space

analysis

  • option 1
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(n)
  • option 2
    • time complexity O(n)
    • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: 73. Set Matrix Zeroes
entry.content:
problem

solution

  1. 將第一列與第一行是否有出現零，設置flag = true;
  2. 除了第一列第一行的其餘陣列，如果有0出現，則將對應的第一行或第一列設為0
  3. 遍歷除了第一列第一行得其餘數陣列，如果當前第一行第一列為0，則該位置設置為0
  4. 根據flag 更新第一行第一列為0

analysis

entry.title: 76. Minimum Window Substring
entry.content:
problem

solution

  • 兩指標，分別指向窗口的左右索引，窗口不斷向右移動，當滿族條件時，則收縮左邊的索引。

    analysis

  • time complexity O(n)
  • speed complexity O(n)

entry.title: 78. Subsets
entry.content:
problem

給定一個陣列，假設其元素都唯一，返回所有的子集。可以是任何順序

solution

  • 先new 一個vector<vector<int>>，然後用backtracking方式搜尋所有子集，直到長度超過陣列長度為止。
  • 樹的每個節點的拜訪

analysis

time complexity O(2^n)
space complexity O(n)

entry.title: 79. Word Search
entry.content:
problem

Solution

終止條件 if(word.size() == k) return true;

  • 也可以不用visited 額外空間，只需要拜訪到的對board進行修改，結束後再恢復之前的狀態。

analysis

  • time complexity O(4*n^2)
  • space complexity O(n^2)

entry.title: 7. Reverse Integer
entry.content:
problem

solution

analysis

  • time complexity O(1)
  • space complexity O(1)

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment

entry.title: hexo NeXt的設置(持續更新)
entry.content:
hexo 網誌框架 + github Page

install hexo

Choose theme

  • 很多人使用NeXt

也可以下載穩定版本zip，解壓縮後重新命名成next，放到blog/themes 底下，自己新增themes資料夾。
我自己也使用NeXt

  • 我遇到的問題
    • 可能會無法正常啟動，原因是hexo在5.0之後把swig刪除，需要自己安裝npm i hexo-renderer-swig
    • cannot GET /20%/

參考配置
參考配置2
參考配置3

我的配置

  • 去_config.yml(./_config.yml)

我的 themes下的配置文件(.theme/next/_config.yml)

新增 pags, categories, about資料夾

hexo g會編譯並產生public目錄，底下為之後要部署的網誌

  • 新增 pags, categories, about資料夾
    用命令方式新增，會自動在source 目錄底下新增該目錄並在目錄底下新增index.md，如下。 在手動至

做了哪些事

  • 搜尋功能 npm install hexo-generator-searchdb --save
  • 上傳github npm install hexo-deployer-git --save
  • 加載進度條
    $ git clone https://github.com/theme-next/theme-next-pace themes/next/source/lib/pace
    修改 next/_config.yml
    pace = true
  • 網站運行時間
    修改 next/_config.yml
  • sidebar 近期文章
  • 顯示當前瀏覽進度
    修改 next/_config.yml
  • 側邊欄移至左邊
    Muse 和 Mist 則需要深度修改source code才能實現改變側邊欄位置
    修改themes/next/source/css/_custom/custom.styl 修改themes/next/source/js/src/motion.js

TODO

  • 更改背景顏色

  • 更改blog背景

  • 人數統計

  • 評論系統npm install --save gitment

  • 網站地圖 npm install hexo-generator-sitemap --save

  • 點擊愛心功能

  • 鑲嵌音樂

  • 下拉式選單

  • 整理layout

佈署至GitHub Pages

安裝git套件
npm install hexo-deployer-git --save
至github新增repo

至_config.yaml

hexo g生成網誌至public目錄
上傳至github hexo d
public in
https://a920604a.github.io/a920604a.github.io
